tasks.description: Modify libs/infrastructure/src/verify/module_size.rs: add test-file exclusion logic to the line counter — (1) skip files whose names end in _tests.rs, (2) skip files inside any directory named tests/, (3) strip #[cfg(test)] mod blocks from the line count before comparing to max_lines. Change the max_lines violation from VerifyFinding::warning to VerifyFinding::error (fail-closed per CN-04). Update existing unit tests: test_module_size_warns_for_files_above_max_threshold must now assert outcome.has_errors() (not is_ok()). Add new unit tests for the three exclusion paths (file ending in _tests.rs is skipped, tests/ directory files are skipped, #[cfg(test)] block lines are excluded from count). No CLI or Makefile.toml changes — the subcommand and CI wiring already exist.

Split libs/domain/src/spec.rs (1106 lines) by domain entity grouping: extract inline-spec-element sub-types and their associated validation / conversion logic into separate child modules under libs/domain/src/spec/ (e.g., spec/element.rs, spec/scope.rs, spec/refs.rs, spec/document.rs). Re-export all previously public items from libs/domain/src/spec.rs (now the module root) to keep the public API unchanged (CN-03). Update mod declarations in libs/domain/src/lib.rs if the file moves from spec.rs to spec/mod.rs. Verify with cargo make ci that no downstream compile errors or test failures are introduced.

Split libs/domain/src/tddd/baseline.rs (950 lines): extract the baseline-document types into baseline/document.rs and baseline-persistence/snapshot types into baseline/snapshot.rs (or similar responsibility split). Re-export from tddd/baseline.rs (kept as the module root) so existing imports are unaffected (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes after the split.

Split libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_v2/entries.rs (1013 lines) and libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_v2/methods.rs (842 lines): entries.rs holds catalogue entry enum logic — extract each entry variant's associated impl blocks into separate sub-files (e.g., entries/type_entry.rs, entries/trait_entry.rs, entries/fn_entry.rs). methods.rs holds method descriptor logic — split by method group (e.g., methods/params.rs, methods/returns.rs). Re-export from the respective module roots. Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/usecase/src/merge_gate.rs (2320 lines): this is the largest usecase file. Decompose by responsibility: extract check-group logic into merge_gate/check_group.rs, signal-evaluation logic into merge_gate/signal_eval.rs, and orchestration / public API into merge_gate/mod.rs (or keep merge_gate.rs as the root with child modules). Each resulting file must be ≤700 lines. Re-export public items (CN-03). Given file size, this split may itself require 2 sub-splits to stay under 500-line diff; apply iteratively if needed. Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/usecase/src/dry_check/interactor.rs (970 lines): extract command dispatch into interactor/dispatch.rs, state-machine transitions into interactor/transitions.rs, keeping the public facade in interactor.rs (now ≤700 lines). Split libs/usecase/src/baseline_graph_workflow.rs (940 lines): extract loader / writer steps into baseline_graph_workflow/loader.rs and baseline_graph_workflow/writer.rs. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_to_extended_crate_codec.rs (2349 lines): identify the major conversion responsibilities (type-entry codec, trait-entry codec, fn-entry codec, shared helpers) and extract each into sub-files under tddd/catalogue_to_extended_crate_codec/ (e.g., type_codec.rs, trait_codec.rs, fn_codec.rs, helpers.rs). Keep tddd/catalogue_to_extended_crate_codec.rs as the module root re-exporting the public API (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/in_memory_catalogue_linter.rs (920 lines): extract each linting rule family into in_memory_catalogue_linter/rule_*.rs sub-files (e.g., rule_spec_refs.rs, rule_type_shape.rs). Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/type_signals_evaluator.rs (831 lines): extract per-layer evaluation logic into type_signals_evaluator/layer_eval.rs and type_signals_evaluator/signal_map.rs. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/signal_evaluator_v2/format.rs (2719 lines): this is the largest infrastructure file. Extract each format-category's rendering logic into separate files under signal_evaluator_v2/format/ (e.g., format/type_format.rs, format/trait_format.rs, format/fn_format.rs, format/shared.rs). Keep signal_evaluator_v2/format.rs as the root re-exporting public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/signal_evaluator_v2/generics_eq.rs (2256 lines): extract generic-equality resolution by kind into sub-files under signal_evaluator_v2/generics_eq/ (e.g., generics_eq/lifetime.rs, generics_eq/type_param.rs, generics_eq/const_param.rs, generics_eq/bounds.rs). Keep signal_evaluator_v2/generics_eq.rs as the re-export root (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/signal_evaluator_v2/structural_eq.rs (1196 lines): extract structural-equality checks by node type into sub-files under signal_evaluator_v2/structural_eq/ (e.g., structural_eq/struct_eq.rs, structural_eq/enum_eq.rs, structural_eq/fn_eq.rs). Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/signal_evaluator_v2/mod.rs (767 lines): extract the orchestration / phase-dispatch logic into a sub-file (e.g., signal_evaluator_v2/orchestrate.rs), keeping mod.rs as the thin entry-point. Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/signal_evaluator_v2/phase1/builder.rs (1508 lines): extract builder-step groups into builder/steps.rs and builder/helpers.rs. Re-export public items from each root (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_document_codec/mod.rs (2506 lines): identify major sections (decode path, encode path, shared DTO helpers) and extract into catalogue_document_codec/decode_helpers.rs and catalogue_document_codec/encode_helpers.rs, keeping mod.rs as the thin dispatch root. Split libs/infrastructure/src/tddd/catalogue_document_codec/decode.rs (755 lines): if after mod.rs splitting decode.rs remains above 700 (possibly due to test exclusion bringing it under), verify and split further only if needed. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/review_v2/claude_reviewer.rs (823 lines): extract reviewer-session management into claude_reviewer/session.rs and HTTP/stream handling into claude_reviewer/stream.rs. Split libs/infrastructure/src/dry_check/codex_dry_checker.rs (960 lines): extract codex-invocation logic into codex_dry_checker/invocation.rs and result-parsing into codex_dry_checker/result_parser.rs. Split libs/infrastructure/src/dry_check/store.rs (823 lines): extract persistence helpers into store/writer.rs and store/reader.rs. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/spec/codec.rs (1168 lines): extract the spec-element decoding logic by section into spec/codec/elements.rs and spec/codec/refs.rs, keeping codec.rs (or codec/mod.rs) as the entry-point re-exporting the public decode/encode API. Split libs/infrastructure/src/spec/render.rs (808 lines): extract the section renderers into render/sections.rs or split by rendered artifact type, keeping render.rs (or render/mod.rs) as the entry-point. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/track/render.rs (1372 lines): extract plan.md rendering logic into track/render/plan.rs, registry.md rendering into track/render/registry.rs, and metadata rendering into track/render/metadata.rs. Keep track/render.rs (or render/mod.rs) as the thin entry-point re-exporting the public render functions (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/schema_export.rs (1239 lines): extract per-item-kind export logic into schema_export/types.rs, schema_export/traits.rs, schema_export/functions.rs, keeping schema_export.rs (or schema_export/mod.rs) as the entry-point. Split libs/infrastructure/src/type_catalogue_render.rs (1111 lines): extract rendering for each catalogue section into type_catalogue_render/header.rs, type_catalogue_render/entries.rs, keeping the public render function in the root. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split libs/infrastructure/src/conventions.rs (803 lines): extract add_convention_doc logic into conventions/add.rs, update_convention_index into conventions/update.rs, verify_convention_index into conventions/verify.rs, keeping conventions.rs (or conventions/mod.rs) as the public entry-point re-exporting all three functions. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split apps/cli-composition/src/dry.rs (2420 lines): identify responsibility groups (dry-check flow orchestration, codex invocation wiring, result handling, config loading) and extract each into a sub-file under dry/ (e.g., dry/orchestration.rs, dry/invocation.rs, dry/result.rs, dry/config.rs). Keep dry.rs (or dry/mod.rs) as the thin public entry-point re-exporting the CliApp methods. Re-export public items (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split apps/cli-composition/src/pr/poll.rs (1106 lines): extract polling-loop logic into pr/poll/loop.rs and PR-status parsing into pr/poll/status.rs. Split apps/cli-composition/src/semantic_dup/build.rs (1248 lines): extract index-construction stages into semantic_dup/build/index.rs and embedding-dispatch into semantic_dup/build/embed.rs. Re-export public items from each root (CN-03). Verify cargo make ci passes.

Split apps/cli-composition/src/track/tddd.rs (852 lines): extract per-phase TDDD orchestration steps into track/tddd/phase1.rs and track/tddd/phase2.rs, keeping track/tddd.rs (or tddd/mod.rs) as the thin public entry-point. Re-export public items (CN-03). Run bin/sotp verify module-size as a final validation gate: must exit zero, confirming all 29+ previously-oversized files are now within the 700-line production-code limit (AC-03). Verify full cargo make ci passes (AC-04).

sections.title: Verifier: test exclusion + fail-closed enforcement
description: T001 modifies the existing module_size verifier to implement the three test-exclusion rules from CN-02 and D3: skip *_tests.rs files, skip files inside tests/ directories, and strip #[cfg(test)] mod blocks before counting production lines. It also changes the max_lines violation level from warning to error (fail-closed per CN-04). The CI wiring in Makefile.toml and the subcommand dispatch in CLI are already present; no Makefile.toml changes are needed.

T001 is listed before the file-splitting tasks so that the gate accurately measures production-only line counts before split work is assessed. Files that currently appear over 700 raw lines may fall under the limit once test blocks are excluded; the actual gate behaviour determines which files still need splitting.

sections.title: Domain layer splits
description: T002–T004 split the four domain files that exceed 700 production lines: spec.rs (1106), tddd/baseline.rs (950), tddd/catalogue_v2/entries.rs (1013), and tddd/catalogue_v2/methods.rs (842).

Each task extracts cohesive sub-responsibilities into child modules under the existing directory, re-exporting from the module root so that downstream imports are unaffected (CN-03, no-backward-compat convention). Domain splits do not touch the usecase or infrastructure layers.

sections.title: Usecase layer splits
description: T005–T006 split the usecase files that exceed 700 production lines: merge_gate.rs (2320), dry_check/interactor.rs (970), and baseline_graph_workflow.rs (940). merge_gate.rs is the largest usecase file and may require more than one sub-split within T005 to stay under the 500-line reviewability guideline.
Usecase splits keep the hexagonal port boundaries intact: traits defined in domain are referenced but not moved; infrastructure adapters are not touched.

sections.title: Infrastructure layer splits — tddd subsystem
description: T007–T012 address the densest concentration of oversized files: the tddd subsystem inside libs/infrastructure. Files include catalogue_to_extended_crate_codec.rs (2349), in_memory_catalogue_linter.rs (920), type_signals_evaluator.rs (831), and the signal_evaluator_v2 and catalogue_document_codec subdirectories which contain multiple files each exceeding 700 lines.
Each task targets a cohesive group of files within the tddd module tree so that related split modules land together, minimising the risk of transient compile errors between tasks.

sections.title: Infrastructure layer splits — review, dry_check, spec, track, rendering
description: T013–T017 split the remaining oversized infrastructure files outside the tddd subsystem: review_v2/claude_reviewer.rs (823), dry_check/codex_dry_checker.rs (960), dry_check/store.rs (823), spec/codec.rs (1168), spec/render.rs (808), track/render.rs (1372), schema_export.rs (1239), type_catalogue_render.rs (1111), and conventions.rs (803).

These files span the review, dry_check, spec, track, and rendering responsibilities within infrastructure. They are batched by closely related file groups to keep each task focused on a single module directory.

sections.title: Apps/cli-composition splits + final gate
description: T018–T020 split the oversized files in apps/cli-composition: dry.rs (2420), pr/poll.rs (1106), semantic_dup/build.rs (1248), and track/tddd.rs (852). These are composition-layer files wiring infrastructure adapters to CLI commands; no domain or usecase logic is moved.

T020 additionally runs bin/sotp verify module-size as the final validation gate, confirming AC-03 (all previously-oversized files now within 700 production lines) before the full cargo make ci pass (AC-04).
